_comment: Snippet for ~/.claude/settings.json — merge into the existing hooks.PreToolUse array. Registers the cc-task closure-discipline gate (cc-task `cc-task-closure-hook-acceptance-criteria-gate`). Blocks `mv` / `git mv` of cc-task .md files from active/ to closed/ when any `## Acceptance criteria` checkbox is unchecked. Bypass via HAPAX_CC_TASK_CLOSURE_GATE_OFF=1.
